title: Valid-By-Construction Review Record Closeout

goal: Record #372 closeout evidence after adding a valid-by-construction review-record authoring command.
non_goals: Do not use this generated skeleton as proof that review work is complete.

review_mode.review question: Did this slice remove one normal manual durable artifact authoring loop?

findings.title: [Workspace]: Convert remaining durable artifact authoring paths to valid-by-construction commands
findings.evidence: agentic-planning-bootstrap create-review creates a planning-review/v1 skeleton with slug normalization, date, scope, mode, retention, validation, dry-run support, and optional derived markdown.
findings.notes: The command was dogfooded to create this closeout record, then the record was filled with specific evidence.

retention.closeout shape: shrink or archive after findings are routed

cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .
